AR1.justification: Triage routed to daybook/2026-05-17.md Log/Handoff with rationale that Status changes belong with what actually happened (not speculative intent), correctly avoided decisions.md and observations.md, and left followups.md untouched until user direction.

AR2.justification: Cold-pickup triage, not a procedural runbook.

AR3.justification: All references are relative bare filenames consistent with the methodology and resolve; daybook uses ISO date naming.

AR4.justification: Wrote a complete Intent/Log/Handoff/Guardrails/Generated-by daybook entry append-only, no in-place mutation of historical files; the explicit handoff including 'first thing next session' makes a re-pickup coherent.
